---
title: "Bayesian Model for March Madness Score Differential Prediction"
author: "Eftyghia Kourtelidis"
date: "2026-04-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# load libraries
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
```

``` {r}
# load data
teams <- read.csv("Dataset/MTeams.csv")
regular <- read.csv("Dataset/MRegularSeasonCompactResults.csv")
tourney <- read.csv("Dataset/MNCAATourneyCompactResults.csv")
seeds <- read.csv("Dataset/MNCAATourneySeeds.csv")
point_diff <- read.csv("Dataset/Tournament Game Point Differentials.csv")
head(teams)
head(regular)
head(tourney)
head(seeds)
head(point_diff)
```

```{r}
# compute team strength metrics
# score differential for each game
regular$ScoreDiff <- regular$WScore - regular$LScore

# create dataframe for winners
wins <- regular %>%
  group_by(WTeamID) %>%
  summarise(
    Wins = n(),
    AvgScoreDiff_W = mean(ScoreDiff),
    AvgPointsFor = mean(WScore)
  )

# create dataframe for losses
losses <- regular %>%
  group_by(LTeamID) %>%
  summarise(
    Losses = n(),
    AvgScoreDiff_L = mean(-ScoreDiff),
    AvgPointsAgainst = mean(LScore)
  )

# combine wins and losses
team_stats <- full_join(wins, losses, by = c("WTeamID" = "LTeamID"))

team_stats <- team_stats %>%
  mutate(
    Games = Wins + Losses,
    WinPct = Wins / Games,
    AvgScoreDiff = (AvgScoreDiff_W + AvgScoreDiff_L) / 2
  )
```
